featured.name: be asleep
featured.example: I was asleep when you called.

featured.name: be away
featured.example: I am going to be away for a while.
featured.example_translation: Voy a estar ausente durante un tiempo.

featured.name: brand new
featured.example_translation: A ella le encanta la ropa nueva.

featured.name: by the way
featured.example: By the way, I saw your sister yesterday.
featured.example_translation: Por cierto, vi a tu hermana ayer.

featured.name: first of all
featured.example: First of all, we would like to wish everyone a Happy New Year.
featured.example_translation: Ante todo desearíamos desearle a todo el mundo un feliz año nuevo.

featured.name: have a shower
featured.example: John has a shower every night before he goes to sleep.
featured.example_translation: John se ducha cada noche antes de acostarse.

featured.name: have dinner
featured.example: May I have fish for dinner? It is my favourite dish.
featured.example_translation: ¿Puedo comer pescado para la cena? Es mi plato favorito.

featured.name: if only
featured.example: If only I didn't have so many obligations.
featured.example_translation: Si tan solo no tuviera tantas obligaciones.

featured.name: just in case
featured.example: Give me your phone number, just in case there is a problem.
featured.example_translation: Dame tu número de teléfono, por si acaso hay un problema.

featured.name: on second thought
featured.example: On second thought, I will accept the job.

featured.name: on the way
featured.example: I met John on the way home.
featured.example_translation: Me encontré a John de camino a casa.

featured.name: on time
featured.example: Will my flight be on time?

featured.name: to be about to do something
featured.example: I was about to do my homework when my mother rang.
featured.example_translation: Estaba a punto de hacer los deberes cuando me llamó mi madre.

featured.name: to be grateful for
featured.example: You should be grateful for what you have.
featured.example_translation: Tendrías que estar agradecido por lo que tienes.

featured.name: to be right
featured.example: I think you are right on this issue.
featured.example_translation: Creo que tienes razón en este tema.

featured.name: to be wrong
featured.example: What do you do when you know you are wrong?
featured.example_translation: ¿Qué haces cuando sabes que estás equivocado?

featured.name: to change one's mind
featured.example: It's never too late to change one's mind.
featured.example_translation: Nunca es demasiado tarde para cambiar de opinión.

featured.name: to do one's best
featured.example: Everyone should try to do their best.
featured.example_translation: Todo el mundo tendría que intentar hacer lo mejor posible.

a.name: after hours
a.example: The bars are open after hours on Saturdays.
a.example_translation: Los bares están abiertos después de horas los sabados.

a.name: as a joke
a.example: What began as a joke could have had serious consequences.
a.example_translation: Lo que comenzó como una broma podía haber tenido consecuencias graves.

a.name: as follows
a.example: The rules for these classes are as follows:…
a.example_translation: Las normas para estas clases son las siguientes:…

a.name: at random
a.example: They chose her CV at random.

b.name: be asleep
b.example: I was asleep when you called.

b.name: be away
b.example: I am going to be away for a while.
b.example_translation: Voy a estar ausente durante un tiempo.

b.name: be fired
b.example: He will have to look for employment after being fired.
b.example_translation: El tendrá que buscar trabajo tras ser despedido.

b.name: be in labour
b.example: A woman is considered to be in labour the moment her water breaks.
b.example_translation: Se considera que una mujer está de parto en el momento en que rompe aguas.

b.name: brand new
b.example_translation: A ella le encanta la ropa nueva.

b.name: by the way
b.example: By the way, I saw your sister yesterday.
b.example_translation: Por cierto, vi a tu hermana ayer.

c.name: countless times
c.example: I know this has happened countless times.
c.example_translation: Sé que esto ha pasado en innumerables ocasiones.

d.name: drop the price
d.example: That shop will drop the price of all their items for January.
d.example_translation: Esa tienda bajará los precios de sus productos para enero.

f.name: first of all
f.example: First of all, we would like to wish everyone a Happy New Year.
f.example_translation: Ante todo desearíamos desearle a todo el mundo un feliz año nuevo.

g.name: go downstairs
g.example: You will have to go downstairs, I forgot the jacket.
g.example_translation: Tendrás que bajar, he olvidado la chaqueta.

h.name: have a shower
h.example: John has a shower every night before he goes to sleep.
h.example_translation: John se ducha cada noche antes de acostarse.

h.name: have dinner
h.example: May I have fish for dinner? It is my favourite dish.
h.example_translation: ¿Puedo comer pescado para la cena? Es mi plato favorito.

i.name: if it is all the same to
i.example: If it is all the same to you, I would like to buy this one instead.
i.example_translation: Si a ti te da igual me gustaría comprar este mejor.

i.name: if only
i.example: If only I didn't have so many obligations.
i.example_translation: Si tan solo no tuviera tantas obligaciones.

i.name: in any case
i.example: I don't want to go to the party and in any case, I haven't been invited.
i.example_translation: No quiero ir a la fiesta y en cualquier caso, no he sido invitado.

i.name: in due time
i.example: You will know the truth in due time.
i.example_translation: Sabrás la verdad a su debido tiempo.

i.name: in some way or other
i.example: Many people have contributed to these notes in some way or other.
i.example_translation: Mucha gente ha contribuido a estas anotaciones de una manera u otra.

i.name: in the small (wee) hours
i.translation: a altas horas de la madrugada
i.example: I was lying in bed awake until the small hours of the morning.
i.example_translation: Estaba tumbado/a en la cama despierto/a hasta altas horas de la madrugada.

i.name: in the wink of an eye
i.translation: en un abrir y cerrar de ojos
i.example: She got dressed in the wink of an eye.
i.example_translation: Ella se vistió en un abrir y cerrar de ojos.

j.name: just in case
j.example: Give me your phone number, just in case there is a problem.
j.example_translation: Dame tu número de teléfono, por si acaso hay un problema.

j.name: just now
j.example: Sorry I have just now seen your e-mail.
j.example_translation: Disculpa, acabo de ver tu correo.

l.name: lean towards something
l.example: I am leaning towards taking the job.
l.example_translation: Me inclino por coger el trabajo.

m.name: make a remark
m.example: He wanted to make a remark regarding the previous meeting.
m.example_translation: Él quiso hacer una observación con referencia a la reunión previa.

m.name: much to one's regret
m.example: Much to my regret I have to postpone my wedding with Tom.
m.example_translation: Muy a mi pesar tengo que posponer mi boda con Tom.

o.name: on second thought
o.example: On second thought, I will accept the job.

o.name: on the way
o.example: I met John on the way home.
o.example_translation: Me encontré a John de camino a casa.

o.name: on time
o.example: Will my flight be on time?

p.name: pay in cash
p.example: If you don't have a credit card, you can pay in cash.
p.example_translation: Si no tienes una tarjeta de credito, puedes pagar en efectivo.

p.name: put something right
p.example: I have to put right this situation.

s.name: speak plainly
s.example: You must speak plainly to be understood.
s.example_translation: Tienes que hablar con claridad para ser entendido.

t.name: tell the way
t.example: Can you tell me the way to the local police office?
t.example_translation: ¿Me puede decir el camino a la oficina de la policía local?

t.name: the naked truth
t.example: The naked truth is always better than the best dress.
t.example_translation: La pura verdad siempre es mejor que el mejor vestido.

t.name: to ask for trouble
t.example: You better not ask for trouble in this discotech.
t.example_translation: Mejor no armes jaleo en esta discoteca.

t.name: to be about to do something
t.example: I was about to do my homework when my mother rang.
t.example_translation: Estaba a punto de hacer los deberes cuando me llamó mi madre.

t.name: to be fully informed
t.example: He prefers to be fully informed about the state of his bank account.
t.example_translation: Él prefiere estar bien informado sobre el estado de su cuenta bancaria.

t.name: to be grateful for
t.example: You should be grateful for what you have.
t.example_translation: Tendrías que estar agradecido por lo que tienes.

t.name: to be identical to
t.example: This poster is identical to that other one.
t.example_translation: Este póster es idéntico a aquel otro.

t.name: to be no good
t.example: It's no good shouting at me like that.
t.example_translation: No sirve de nada gritarme de esa manera.

t.name: to be of age
t.example: He will be of age to drink next week.
t.example_translation: Será mayor de edad para beber la semana que viene.

t.name: to be right
t.example: I think you are right on this issue.
t.example_translation: Creo que tienes razón en este tema.

t.name: to be rumored
t.example: It is rumoured that a big snake lives in this park.
t.example_translation: Se rumorea que una serpiente grande vive en este parque.

t.name: to be under age
t.example: He will still be under age next month.
t.example_translation: El mes que viene todavía será menor de edad.

t.name: to be upset
t.example: My mother is upset because I didn't go to school today.
t.example_translation: Mi madre está disgustada porque no fui a la escuela hoy.

t.name: to be wrong
t.example: What do you do when you know you are wrong?
t.example_translation: ¿Qué haces cuando sabes que estás equivocado?

t.name: to change one's mind
t.example: It's never too late to change one's mind.
t.example_translation: Nunca es demasiado tarde para cambiar de opinión.

t.name: to do one's best
t.example: Everyone should try to do their best.
t.example_translation: Todo el mundo tendría que intentar hacer lo mejor posible.

t.name: to doubt someone's word
t.translation: dudar de la palabra de alguien
t.example: This is not the first time that he lied to me. I will always doubt his word.
t.example_translation: No es la primera vez que él me miente. Siempo dudo de su palabra.

t.name: to draw a conclusion
t.example: Is there sufficient information available on which to draw a conclusion?
t.example_translation: ¿Hay suficiente información disponible para sacar una conclusión?

t.name: to keep a secret
t.example: Three may keep a secret if two of them are dead.
t.example_translation: Tres pueden guardar un secreto si dos de ellos están muertos.

t.name: to look on the bright side of things
t.translation: ver la parte positiva de las cosas
t.example: You are such an optomist. You always look on the bright side of things.
t.example_translation: Eres optimista porque siempre miras la parte positiva de las cosas.

t.name: to lose one's temper
t.example: When something becomes difficult, one should make sure to never lose one's temper.
t.example_translation: Cuando algo se complica, uno tendría que asegurarse de no perder nunca los estribos.

t.name: to not have the slightest doubt
t.example: I didn't have the the slightest doubt that he was lying.
t.example_translation: Sin ninguna duda sabía que él estaba mintiendo.

t.name: to waste (one's) time
t.example: Life is too short to waste one's time.
t.example_translation: La vida es muy corta para perder el tiempo.

u.name: under no circumstances
u.example: Under no circumstances will I let the enemy know the information.
u.example_translation: Bajo ninguna circunstancia le daré a conocer la información al enemigo.

w.name: within one's reach
w.example: I currently have many options within my reach.
w.example_translation: Actualmente tengo a mi alcance bastantes opciones.

w.name: without warning
w.example: The operating system restarts without warning.
w.example_translation: El sistema operativo se reinicia sin avisar.
